protein_name: Inhibitory regulator of the Ras-cyclic AMP pathway. Binds inositol tetrakisphosphate (IP4). 2 alternatively spliced human isoforms have been reported. Note: This description may include information from UniProtKB.

raw_fields.Cellular Component: cytoplasm; cytosol; perinuclear region of cytoplasm
raw_fields.Molecular Function: GTPase activator activity; metal ion binding; phospholipid binding; protein binding; zinc ion binding
raw_fields.Biological Process: intracellular signal transduction; negative regulation of Ras protein signal transduction; regulation of intracellular signal transduction; signal transduction
raw_fields.Alt. Names/Synonyms: GAP1M; GTPase-activating protein 1m; GTPase-activating protein of RAS; Ras GTPase-activating protein 2; RAS p21 protein activator 2; RASA2; RASGAP
